However, current forensic validation reveals a micro-entity with only 1.6 million RMB in capital and 0 insured employees in 2024. This stark contradiction points to a 'legacy fossil'—a company that has long abandoned physical manufacturing and either transitioned into a micro-scale, asset-light trading shell dealing in mechanical equipment and auto parts, or has become a completely dormant entity serving purely administrative or billing purposes.
